keyframes.still_prompt: Ancient Hebrew prophet Zechariah mid-gasp of awakening in a pillared night sanctum, 520 BC Jerusalem Second-Temple era, eyes just opening with amber firelight reflecting inside them, coarse linen tunic and deep indigo woolen mantle slipping from one shoulder. Hard amber key light from an unseen oil lamp below rim-lights his cheekbone and beard; deep obsidian shadow swallows the back of the hall. Stone columns carved with Paleo-Hebrew etching glow faintly with pale holographic light as he stirs. Dust motes hang luminescent like quiet embers. Terracotta floor tiles, indigo-night ceiling. Palette: indigo-black, ember-orange, amber-crimson, silver, gold-as-fire-accent. High contrast, centered composition, revelation register. Photographic realism, 16:9, --style raw.

Towering angel of Yahweh rim-lit silhouette in a nocturnal temple antechamber, 520 BC Second-Temple era, wings half-unfolded and catching ember-orange light along every feather's edge, robed in deep indigo linen with bronzed silver trim. Face almost consumed by shadow, a single blade of amber firelight crossing the brow. One hand raised in a gesture of summoning, palm luminescent. Prismatic shafts of pale holographic light pierce rising incense smoke behind him, hinting at unseen realms. Obsidian stone floor reflects fire-gold in long streaks. Palette: indigo-black, ember-orange, amber-crimson, silver, gold-as-fire-accent. High contrast, centered, sacred awe register. Photographic realism, 16:9, --style raw.

Architectural macro of the seven-branch golden menorah standing alone in a vaulted night sanctum of the Second Temple, 520 BC Jerusalem. Hammered solid gold base and central shaft ornamented with Paleo-Canaanite almond-blossom motifs, the metal carrying a subtle iridescent electronic sheen. Low firelight throws hard amber key up the lampstand's curves; deep obsidian shadow fills the hall behind it. Seven branches rise symmetrically, each tipped with an unlit amber-crimson oil cup awaiting fire. Luminescent dust motes drift upward in slow spirals between the branches. Palette: indigo-black, ember-orange, amber-crimson, silver, gold-as-fire-accent. Centered symmetrical composition, reverence and anticipation register. Photographic realism, 16:9, --style raw.

Overhead close-up of the golden bowl crowning the menorah, 520 BC Second-Temple era, brimming with dark viscous olive oil that catches firelight as tiny amber-crimson constellations on its black mirror surface. Hammered gold rim engraved with Paleo-Hebrew micro-script glowing faintly pale holographic silver. Seven small channels radiate outward from the bowl like a bronze sunburst. Hard amber key from below, deep obsidian shadow above, a single curl of incense smoke crossing the frame. The metal carries subtle iridescent sheen; minor chromatic aberration at the rim's peak glints. Palette: indigo-black, ember-orange, amber-crimson, silver, gold-as-fire-accent. Macro sacred detail, centered, reverent register. Photographic realism, 16:9, --style raw.

Seven amber-crimson oil flames burning in a strict horizontal row along the menorah's seven branches, 520 BC Jerusalem Temple at deep night, viewed as a near-frontal architectural detail. Each flame carries a clean plasma halo and faintly luminescent tips, rim-lighting the hammered gold branches into blades of fire. Obsidian stone wall behind, swallowed in shadow except where the flames carve warm amber pools. Minor chromatic aberration at each flame's peak intensity. A luminescent breath of wind passes through, making every flame lean in perfect unison. Palette: indigo-black, ember-orange, amber-crimson, silver, gold-as-fire-accent. High contrast, celebration and trance register. Photographic realism, 16:9, --style raw.

Extreme macro of seven hammered-gold oil pipes branching from a central bowl like radiant veins, 520 BC Second-Temple ornament, bronze-silver iridescent sheen on every surface, Paleo-Hebrew letters etched along each pipe glowing faintly pale holographic. Tiny rivulets of dark olive oil flow through translucent sections, rendered as clean luminescent geometry. Hard amber key from below, obsidian shadow filling negative space. The pipes curve with organic symmetry, a temple sunburst rendered as sacred mechanism. Subtle electronic geometric motion hints in the ornament. Palette: indigo-black, ember-orange, amber-crimson, silver, gold-as-fire-accent. Architectural sacred macro, centered, mechanical reverence register. Photographic realism, 16:9, --style raw.

Two ancient olive trees standing sentinel on either side of an unseen central altar, silhouetted against a deep indigo-night sky pierced by cold silver starlight, 520 BC Judean hillside outside Jerusalem. Gnarled twisted trunks rim-lit by distant ember-orange temple firelight beyond frame. Every silver leaf catches faint moonlight sheen. Dust motes rise between the two trees like quiet embers. Fiber-optic silver threads of spider-silk glint faintly between branches. Obsidian mountain mass behind. The trees form a sacred gateway, mirroring one another in perfect symmetry. Palette: indigo-black, ember-orange, amber-crimson, silver, gold-as-fire-accent. Symmetrical composition, contemplative covenantal register. Photographic realism, 16:9, --style raw.

Zerubbabel the Hebrew governor-builder at night on a stone foundation of the Second Temple under construction, 520 BC Jerusalem, holding a hammered bronze plumb line hanging perfectly vertical, its weight catching a single ember-orange firelight reflection. Coarse dusty linen robe, indigo wool overmantle, leather belt, weathered hands. Stars behind him shimmer faintly in a geometric pattern. Torchlight from below rim-lights his brow and beard, deep obsidian shadow engulfs the unfinished walls. Subtle luminescent dust settles on his shoulders. A faint pale holographic grid shimmers along the plumb line's axis. Palette: indigo-black, ember-orange, amber-crimson, silver, gold-as-fire-accent. Determined, confrontational awe register. Photographic realism, 16:9, --style raw.

Night sky over Jerusalem hill country rendered as indigo-black velvet, 520 BC era, with seven brilliant stars arranging themselves into the Paleo-Hebrew letters רוח (RUACH, Spirit) — each letter glowing with clean pale holographic light and a subtle electronic plasma halo. Thin silver light-shafts descend from the letters toward unseen earth. Faint luminescent wind-motes stream across the frame as clean rendered geometry. A distant ember-orange glow on the horizon hints at Temple firelight far below. High altitude, epic cinematic scale. Palette: indigo-black, ember-orange, amber-crimson, silver, gold-as-fire-accent. Sacred awe and revelation, confrontational trance register. Photographic realism, 16:9, --style raw.

morphs.motion_prompt: Drone camera sweeps kinetically from the prophet's ember-reflecting eyes upward and forward into the sanctum as his mantle still trembles from waking breath. Indigo shadows pull back like curtains; ember firelight reshapes into the wings of the angel resolving out of smoke. Pale holographic shafts break through to rim-light the messenger's half-turned face. Luminescent dust reorganises into feather edges. Sacred awe register ignites.

Kinetic aerial swoop past the angel's raised hand, indigo smoke curling into hammered-gold curvature as the summoning gesture dissolves into the almond-blossom ornament of the menorah shaft. Ember glow slides down the branches in a fast orbital zoom; the obsidian hall widens around a newly revealed centerpiece. Paleo-Hebrew etchings migrate from column into lampstand base. Reverence and anticipation register deepens.

Drone rises in a sweeping arc along the central shaft toward the crowning bowl, gold surface iridescence intensifying with subtle chromatic aberration at the rim. Dust motes spiral upward, each becoming a tiny amber-crimson reflection on the oil's black mirror as the viewpoint plunges overhead. The hammered rim's Paleo-Hebrew micro-script flares pale holographic silver. Macro reverence register intensifies.

Drone pulls back from the overhead bowl in a fast orbital zoom as seven small oil channels ignite in sequence like a sunrise chord. Each ignition throws an amber-crimson pulse outward, plasma halos blooming in unison. The camera levels off to a frontal architectural row as seven flames stand erect together. Obsidian wall receives the warm pools. Celebration and trance register ignites.

Drone plunges kinetically through the central flame into the gold bowl below, viewpoint narrowing as it enters a single pipe opening. Walls of hammered gold close in and rotate into the macro sunburst of seven oil channels, iridescent sheen intensifying. Luminescent oil rivulets race along each pipe as clean rendered geometry. Paleo-Hebrew etchings flare pale silver. Mechanical reverence register.

Camera exits the pipework through a silver-threaded vent and climbs in a sweeping arc outward through the Temple wall, indigo-night air rushing in. The obsidian horizon widens and the two ancient olive trees rise symmetrically into frame, silver leaves catching distant ember glow below frame. Dust motes transform into starlight. Covenantal register settles into sacred silence.

Drone glides between the two olive trees like passing through a living gateway, trunks rim-lit sliding past either side. The indigo hillside opens onto the foundation stones of the rising Temple, ember torchlight climbing the unfinished walls. Zerubbabel resolves at the centre, plumb line already hanging vertical, stars sharpening behind his head in geometric order. Determined confrontational awe register takes hold.

Fast orbital zoom up the plumb line's pale holographic axis, leaving the builder's shoulders below as the camera rockets vertically into the indigo vault. Stars smear into streaks then snap into formation as the seven letters of RUACH ignite one by one. Luminescent wind-motes stream past the lens. Ember Temple glow shrinks to a distant coal. Revelation and trance register detonates.

Drone descends in a kinetic aerial swoop from the glowing Paleo-Hebrew letters through silver light-shafts — wind becoming breath, stars becoming dust motes, indigo sky folding into sanctum ceiling. The ember horizon returns as an unseen oil lamp, and the prophet's eyes open once more mid-gasp, firelight reflecting inside them. Sacred awe settles into revelation — seamlessly closes the hypnotic loop.

thumbnail_keyframe.still_prompt: Ultra-close thumbnail portrait of Hebrew prophet Zechariah, 520 BC Jerusalem Second-Temple era, face filling seventy percent of the frame with direct intense eye contact, irises reflecting seven tiny amber-crimson flames in a perfect horizontal row. Coarse beard and weathered brow rim-lit by hard amber key from below; deep obsidian shadow carves the opposite side of his face into near-silhouette. A single Paleo-Hebrew letter ר glows faintly pale holographic on his forehead with a subtle plasma halo. Luminescent dust motes drift across one cheek. Indigo-black background dissolves behind him. Minor chromatic aberration at the flame reflections. Palette: indigo-black, ember-orange, amber-crimson, silver, gold-as-fire-accent. High contrast, confrontational sacred awe register. Photographic realism, 16:9, --style raw.
